name: ui_toggle_press
desc: Press a UI button/toggle in any open BUILD X WebView2 by data-test-id or bridge action name. The press routes through the React handler → postMessage → C# bridge so the wire fires identically to a human click.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: Target WebView2 key (e.g. Main, DrawingExporter, ParameterEditor, sheet-view-setup, error-warning-manager).

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Bridge action name (e.g. createSheetWithNumberAndTitleblock) OR data-test-id selector value (e.g. btn-refresh-all).

parameters.name: payload_json
parameters.description: Optional JSON string of arguments. Passed as the second arg to the bridge function or merged into the postMessage payload.
